description: hrbr MCP hooks: Harbor routing, session capture, compaction hints.

hooks.command: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/hrbr-hook.XXXXXX") || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }; cat > "$tmp"; (hrbr hook pretooluse < "$tmp" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -f "$tmp") >/dev/null 2>&1 & printf "{}\n"'
sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/hrbr-hook.XXXXXX") || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }; cat > "$tmp"; (hrbr hook posttooluse < "$tmp" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -f "$tmp") >/dev/null 2>&1 & printf "{}\n"'

sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/hrbr-hook.XXXXXX") || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }; cat > "$tmp"; (hrbr hook userpromptsubmit < "$tmp" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -f "$tmp") >/dev/null 2>&1 & printf "{}\n"'
